title: Infosys Recognized as Leader and Star Performer in Everest Group Adobe Services Assessment 2025
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Everest Group recognized it as a Leader and Star Performer in the Adobe Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025. The assessment evaluated 33 service providers, and Infosys was cited for growth in Adobe services revenue, client traction in North America and Europe, and ability to deliver large-scale Adobe programs.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in the Everest Group Adobe Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025.
